author: judge-correctness-c4

dimensionScores.rationale: The single P1 that capped c3 is genuinely fixed: reconcile.py:68 now .sort_index() after unioning deep-history periods, restoring the ascending-period invariant that build_symbol_snapshot's price.iloc[-1] (snapshot.py:79) and return_6m out.iloc[-1] (snapshot.py:96) depend on. Verified end-to-end — for a yfinance-scraped symbol with FSDS/EDGAR deep history the merged index is chronological (['2019'..'2024']) and the current price/return_6m land on the LATEST period, old periods stay NaN; even the worst case (dated scraped labels + year audited labels) sorts correctly because both formats are 4-digit-year-prefixed. F2/c3 also fixed: audited-only listings now carry field-level provenance (snapshot.py:58-60 populates audited_fields when canonical seeds from audited, wired at snapshot.py:199-203). No P0/P1 remain. Residual correctness is two OPT-IN EDINET P2s: a quarterly balance instant can be booked as annual (edinet.py:60, no annual-report guard, contrast the income/cashflow full-year check at :64-69) and the consolidated/非-consolidated member is dropped (edinet.py:88/116). Both require a Subscription-Key, so no default-path exposure. Up strongly from c3's 3.77 — the live P1 is gone.

223 pytest + 62 vitest green (runs/pytest.txt, runs/vitest.txt), ruff clean. Crucially the order-blind spot that let the c3 regression ship green is closed: test_fr010_esef.py:195 now asserts the merged index order ['2022','2023','2024'] (not just values by label), and test_mirror.py adds the size-ceiling cases. Test-first discipline visible in the two fix commits. The remaining EDINET P2s lack failing fixtures, but they are opt-in.

The c3 F6 opportunity is closed: mirror.py:70 adds a max_bytes ceiling (default 4 GiB), mirror.py:106 aborts the stream past it and mirror.py:117 unlinks the partial .tmp on every exception (strictly better than the pre-fix partial-leak). URLs remain hardcoded/trusted (no SSRF). No new exposure from the three fixes.

Provider internals stay clean, but ingest/enrichment.py is still the top hotspot: 617 LOC holding 7 run_* cycles (enrichment.py:43 run_esef_cycle .. :513 run_esef_sweep) — the c2 F1 / c3 F5 opportunity, unchanged. Everything else is well-bounded.

Unchanged and strong: bulk parsers stream row-by-row (no OOM on the 1GB-VPS target), incremental compute recomputes only dirty symbols; the reconcile sort adds a single O(n log n) over a handful of fiscal periods — negligible.

topFindings: The c3 P1 regression is fixed at reconcile.py:68 (.sort_index()) and locked by an order-asserting test (test_fr010_esef.py:195) — current price/return_6m verified to land on the latest period for deep-history scraped symbols.
No P0/P1 anywhere; the three fixes since c3 (reconcile sort, audited-only provenance, mirror ceiling) introduce no new defect (adversarially confirmed).
Residual is two opt-in EDINET P2s (edinet.py:60, :88/:116) and one maintainability opportunity (enrichment.py:43-513).

author: judge-pipeline-c4

dimensionScores.rationale: The production ingest/compute path is now correct on the deep-history universe it was built for: reconcile.py:68 re-sorts the merged frame so the current price/return_6m/price-derived ratios attach to the true latest period (snapshot.py:79/96), fixing the c3 mis-pricing regression. Audited-only listings (JP/UK with no yfinance scrape) now build canonical from audited and carry provenance (snapshot.py:58-60). The only wrong-value paths left are opt-in EDINET (interim balance instant edinet.py:60; parent-only figure edinet.py:88/116) — off by default.

Broad green suite (223+62) with the regression's blind spot now covered by an explicit period-order assertion (test_fr010_esef.py:195) and mirror-ceiling tests (test_mirror.py). The incremental-compute and price-refresh fixtures from c3 remain.
Mirror fetch is now bounded (mirror.py:70/106) with partial-cleanup (mirror.py:117); trusted URLs only. No regression in the fix surface.
enrichment.py still concentrates 7 cycles in 617 LOC (enrichment.py:43-513, c3 F5). The fix diffs themselves are small and well-commented (reconcile.py:63-68, snapshot.py:195-198).
Streaming bulk parsers and dirty-only incremental compute keep the self-hosted target memory-safe; the added sort is over a few periods per symbol — no hot-path cost.

topFindings: Deep-history feature is now both retained AND correctly priced — reconcile.py:68 closes the c3 corruption without reintroducing the c2 truncation.
Audited-only self-hosting path (EDINET/Companies House with no scrape) now ships field-level provenance (snapshot.py:199-203).
Only opt-in EDINET P2s and the enrichment.py hotspot remain; no P0/P1.

author: judge-reliability-c4

dimensionScores.rationale: Every c2/c3 P0/P1 is now verified fixed in code with tests, including the last one — the silent, test-invisible reconcile-sort regression (reconcile.py:68) that mis-aligned latest-period price/momentum. A real repro confirms return_6m lands on the latest period and old periods stay NaN. No P0/P1 outstanding. The residual P2s are opt-in EDINET (edinet.py:60 balance instant; edinet.py:116 consolidated tiebreak) — narrow blast radius behind a Subscription-Key.

223 pytest + 62 vitest green; the fix that mattered is now guarded by a period-order assertion (test_fr010_esef.py:195) that would have caught the c3 regression, plus mirror-ceiling cases. A clear reliability improvement — the green suite no longer hides the known failure mode.
Only the mirror byte/time cap was outstanding at c3; the byte ceiling is now in (mirror.py:70/106) with partial cleanup (mirror.py:117). Trusted URLs, no SSRF.
Cleaner provider internals; enrichment.py 617-LOC 7-cycle hotspot unchanged (enrichment.py:43-513) — the sole remaining structural opportunity.
Streaming parsers remove the OOM class on the 1GB-VPS target; incremental compute is dirty-only. Reliability-relevant perf is solid.

topFindings: Recovery is complete: the c3 P1 regression is fixed (reconcile.py:68) and guarded by an order-asserting test — the deep-history universe is priced correctly again.
No P0/P1; the three fixes since c3 add no new defect (adversarially verified across reconcile/snapshot/mirror).
Residual: opt-in EDINET P2s (edinet.py:60, :116) + enrichment.py maintainability opp — none blocking the 80 bar.
